name: Moir: Let the Model Direct Its Own Story for Robust Cross-Domain Knowledge Editing
summary: arXiv:2607.20433v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While language models remain frozen at their training state, the world evolves continuously. Knowledge editing has emerged as a key alternative to...
description: arXiv:2607.20433v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While language models remain frozen at their training state, the world evolves continuously. Knowledge editing has emerged as a key alternative to full retraining, but its deployment is bottlenecked by the erosion of core capabilities: mathematical and programmatic reasoning collapse while encyclopedic recall remains intact. We trace this asymme...
author: Jea Kwon, Jiwon Kim, Dong-kyum Kim, Meeyoung Cha
